items.title: Sam Altman 告诉 OpenAI 员工，军方的“运作决策”由政府负责。
items.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman表示，公司不决定军方如何使用其技术。
items.title_en: Sam Altman tells OpenAI staffers that military's 'operational decisions' are up to the government

items.summary_en: Coherent and Lumentum will both receive $2 billion each from the chip giant as part of the strategic investment.

items.title: OpenAI的阿尔曼（Altman）承认防御协议“看起来是 oportunistic 和 sloppy”在面对回应
items.summary: Sam Altman 表示，OpenAI 应该没有急于与国防部签订协议，并且正在进行一些修改。
items.title_en: OpenAI's Altman admits defense deal 'looked opportunistic and sloppy' amid backlash
items.summary_en: Sam Altman says that OpenAI "shouldn't have rushed" its deal with the Defense Department and was making "some additions."

items.title: Anthropic的克劳德（Claude）在与五角大楼（Pentagon）冲突后，出现了“高错误率”（elevated errors），并在苹果免费应用（Apple's free apps）排行榜上取得了第一名。
items.summary: 该应用程序在苹果App Store中迅速冲上免费应用程序榜首， Anthropic与国防部发生冲突，争论该技术的限制。
items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude sees 'elevated errors' as it tops Apple's free apps after Pentagon clash
items.summary_en: The app surged to the top free app on Apple's App Store after Anthropic clashed with the Department of Defense over limits for the technology.

items.title: 韩国股市指数（Kospi）暴跌超过12%，创下历史新低。
items.summary: 韩国交易所周三暂停了Kospi指数的交易。同时，Kosdaq也触发了熔断机制，收盘下跌14%，收于978.44点。
items.title_en: South Korea's Kospi sinks over 12% to clock its worst day as Iran conflict fuels risk-off sentiment
items.summary_en: The Korea Exchange temporarily halted trading for the Kospi index on Wednesday. A circuit breaker was activated on the Kosdaq as well, which closed 14% lower at 978.44.
